sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Form 424B2 GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC
feed.summary: This Form 424B2 filing from Goldman Sachs Group Inc. details an offering of Autocallable Buffered Basket-Linked Notes due January 27, 2028, guaranteed by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. The notes' payout is based on the performance of an equally weighted basket of six common stocks, maturing unless automatically called on February 5, 2027. The document outlines the terms, potential payouts including a buffered downside, anti-dilution adjustments, and significant risk factors, emphasizing that investors could lose their entire investment.

feed.title: United: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings Inc. (UAL) reported strong fourth-quarter earnings, beating Wall Street expectations with a profit of $1.04 billion and adjusted earnings of $3.10 per share. The airline's revenue also surpassed forecasts, reaching $15.4 billion for the period. These results were generated by Automated Insights using data from Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: Hasbro adds former Nintendo president, Honest Co. CEO to board
feed.summary: Hasbro has appointed Doug Bowser, former president and COO of Nintendo of America Inc., and Carla Vernón, CEO of The Honest Co., to its board of directors. These additions bring significant experience from major consumer brands as Hasbro prepares for its upcoming move from Pawtucket, R.I., to Boston. This strategic move aims to strengthen the company's leadership with diverse industry expertise.

feed.title: Signing Day Sports Addresses Unusual NYSE American Trading Activity
feed.summary: Signing Day Sports, Inc. (SGN) announced it is aware of unusual trading activity in its common stock on the NYSE American but cited no new material business developments or known company-specific reasons for the market volatility. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates SGN as Neutral due to weak financial fundamentals, despite recent funding and merger developments. SGN operates a mobile app for student-athlete recruitment, helping them connect with college coaches.

feed.title: Edison International (EIX) Downgraded by Wells Fargo Amid Fire Liability Concerns
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) experienced a 3.9% stock price decline following a downgrade by Wells Fargo from Equal Weight to Underweight, with a new price target of $59. This downgrade is primarily due to uncertainties surrounding potential liabilities from the Eaton Fire and regulatory challenges in California. The company's financial health shows strong operating margins but is tempered by significant debt levels, and recent insider selling further contributes to a mixed outlook.

feed.title: Amcor to Announce Fiscal 2026 Q2, Half-Year Results
feed.summary: Amcor plc (NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC) will announce its fiscal 2026 second quarter and half-year results after the US market closes on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. A conference call and webcast to discuss the results will be held at 5:30 PM US Eastern Standard Time on the same day. Details for participating in the call and accessing supporting materials are available on Amcor's investor website.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley buys $110M Fremont industrial site as AI demand drives investor interest
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has acquired a nearly 300,000-square-foot industrial site in Fremont for $110 million, driven by increasing investor interest in properties suitable for advanced manufacturing and AI capabilities. The site is currently leased to a long-term tenant, Western Digital, and possesses features essential for artificial intelligence and machine learning operations. This purchase highlights the growing demand for specialized industrial spaces in Silicon Valley.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz Stock Slips As Berkshire Hathaway Signals Plans To Sell
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ: KHC) shares slipped in after-hours trading following Berkshire Hathaway's filing to sell up to 325 million shares of the company, representing a significant portion of its 27.5% stake. This move comes after Warren Buffett's retirement as Berkshire Hathaway's CEO at the end of 2025. Kraft Heinz is expected to report its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on February 11.

feed.title: Merck/Moderna Intismeran Data Show Continued Efficacy In Melanoma
feed.summary: New data from Merck and Moderna's Intismeran (mRNA-4157) melanoma vaccine show continued efficacy. The updated results highlight the ongoing positive impact of the treatment in preventing recurrence and death in patients with high-risk melanoma. This marks a significant milestone in the development of mRNA-based cancer therapies.

feed.title: American Express declares quarterly dividend on Series D preferred shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: American Express (NYSE: AXP) has announced a quarterly dividend of $8,875.00 per share on its 3.550% Fixed Rate Reset Noncumulative Preferred Shares, Series D. This dividend, equivalent to $8.87500 per Depositary Share, will be paid on March 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 1, 2026. The financial services company boasts a 56-year record of continuous dividend payments and also declared a common share dividend of $0.82 payable on February 10, 2026.

feed.title: Integrated Quantum Technologies Taps Former Equifax AI Leader to Drive Secure, Quantum-Ready Platform Growth
feed.summary: Integrated Quantum Technologies has appointed Jeremy Samuelson, a former Principal Data and AI Scientist at Equifax, as Executive Vice President of Artificial Intelligence and Innovation. Samuelson will lead the company's AI strategy, focusing on developing and commercializing its AIQu platform and VEIL privacy-preserving technology to help regulated enterprises securely adopt AI and prepare for quantum-related challenges. Integrated Cyber Solutions Inc., operating as Integrated Quantum Technologies, develops quantum-ready AI infrastructure and currently has a Hold rating from analysts with a C$2.00 price target.

feed.title: MAA Announces Taxable Composition of 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (MAA) has announced the taxable composition of its 2025 distributions to shareholders, indicating no portion is expected to be a return of capital and no foreign taxes were incurred. The release details the distribution classifications for both common stock and preferred stock, which are largely comprised of ordinary taxable distribution with a small percentage as long-term capital gain. This information is preliminary and provided to assist with 1099 form distribution.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz files prospectus supplement for possible resale of 325 million shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: The Kraft Heinz Company has filed a prospectus supplement for the potential resale of up to 325 million shares of its common stock by Berkshire Hathaway Inc. This filing does not imply an immediate sale by Berkshire Hathaway, and Kraft Heinz will not receive any proceeds from such sales. The company, which offers a 6.8% dividend yield, is navigating competitive pressures and preparing for a planned separation into two independent entities in 2026.

feed.title: NOG Schedules Fourth Quarter and Year-End 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. (NOG) announced its plans to release its fourth quarter and year-end 2025 financial and operating results on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, after market close. The company will host a conference call on Thursday, February 26, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Central Time to discuss these results, with dial-in and webcast details provided. A replay of the call will be available until March 12, 2026, and an archive on NOG's website until February 25, 2027.

feed.title: GRABAR LAW OFFICE INVESTIGATES CLAIMS ON BEHALF OF LONG-TERM SHAREHOLDERS OF MOLINA HEALTHCARE, INC. (MOH)
feed.summary: Grabar Law Office is investigating Molina Healthcare, Inc. (MOH) on behalf of long-term shareholders who purchased shares before February 5, 2025. The investigation stems from allegations that certain officers and directors breached fiduciary duties by failing to disclose material adverse facts regarding "medical cost trend assumptions" and a "dislocation between premium rates and medical cost trend." Shareholders are encouraged to contact Grabar Law Office to seek corporate reforms and the return of funds to the company.

feed.title: American Express (AXP) declares preferred stock dividend
feed.summary: American Express (AXP) has declared a quarterly dividend of $8,875.00 per share on its 3.550% Fixed Rate Reset Noncumulative Preferred Shares, Series D. This dividend is equivalent to $8.87500 per related Depositary Share. The payment is scheduled for March 15, 2026, to shareholders on record as of March 1, 2026.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz Registers Potential Berkshire Hathaway Share Resale
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz has filed a resale prospectus supplement with the SEC to register the potential resale of over 325 million existing shares by its major shareholder, Berkshire Hathaway Inc. This administrative step allows for shareholder-driven transactions without Kraft Heinz issuing new shares or receiving proceeds. An analyst has rated KHC stock as a Hold with a $23 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, maintains a Neutral stance due to financial and operational challenges, despite a high dividend yield.

feed.title: Duke Energy eyes Piedmont Triad for potential nuclear development
feed.summary: Duke Energy has submitted an early site permit application to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a potential new nuclear development near the Belews Creek Steam Station in Stokes County, North Carolina. While no final decision has been made, the move allows the company to evaluate the suitability of the site for small modular reactors (SMRs) to meet future energy demands. If approved and pursued, Duke Energy aims to add 600 megawatts of nuclear power to its system by 2037, with the first SMR becoming operational in 2036.

feed.title: CDW Corp. stock underperforms Tuesday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: CDW Corp. (CDW) stock fell on Tuesday, underperforming its competitors. The stock closed at $233.51, representing a 0.32% decrease, while the S&P 500 rose by 0.29%.

feed.title: American Express Declares Dividend on Series D Preferred Stock
feed.summary: American Express Company declared a quarterly dividend of $8,875.00 per share on its 3.550% Fixed Rate Reset Noncumulative Preferred Shares, Series D. This dividend is equivalent to $8.87500 per related Depositary Share and is payable on March 15, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 1, 2026. The company, a global payments and premium lifestyle brand, also provides contact information for media, investors, and analysts.

feed.title: Denver oil and gas company sued by shareholders pending merger
feed.summary: Shareholders are suing to block the $12.8 billion merger between Civitas Resources Inc. and SM Energy, as reported by the Denver Business Journal. Although Civitas denied the allegations, the company did disclose new facts in a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission filing. The suit concerns the pending merger of the Denver-based oil and gas companies.

feed.title: Blackstone Inc. stock falls Tuesday, underperforms market
feed.summary: The article reports that Blackstone Inc. stock fell on Tuesday, performing worse than the broader market. This indicates a negative daily performance for the investment company's shares.

feed.title: SmartFinancial Announces Results for the Fourth Quarter 2025
feed.summary: SmartFinancial, Inc. announced strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, with net income of $13.7 million ($0.81 per diluted common share) for Q4 2025. The company reported significant organic loan and deposit growth, expanded net interest margin, and an increase in tangible book value per common share. Management highlighted 2025 as a year of "tremendous momentum" and "exceptional growth, profitability, and continued improvement."

feed.title: KKR's Americas buyout fund on track to beat $20B target - report (KKR:NYSE)
feed.summary: KKR's Americas private equity fund is reportedly on track to surpass its $20 billion target, potentially reaching its $22 billion hard cap. This achievement would set a new record for the alternative asset manager's Americas private equity strategy.

feed.title: California American Water's Aquifer Storage and Recovery Adds to Community's Water Supply
feed.summary: California American Water is continuing its Aquifer Storage and Recovery (ASR) program during the rainy season to capture and store excess water from the Carmel River for use during droughts. Since December 26, 2025, the program has captured over 240-acre feet of water, and for water year 2024-2025, over 715-acre feet were stored. This initiative, combined with water recycling and a desalination project, aims to build resilient water infrastructure for the community amidst increasing drought periods.

feed.title: Elon Musk asks followers if he should buy Ryanair
feed.summary: In an escalating dispute following Ryanair CEO Michael O'Leary's criticism of Starlink internet for planes, Elon Musk polled his social media followers about buying Ryanair. The feud began after O'Leary dismissed Starlink as too costly and inefficient for the airline, calling Musk an "idiot" and X a "cesspit." Both Musk and O'Leary are known for their provocative public statements, and Ryanair has even launched a "Big Idiot Seat Sale" in response to Musk's comments.

feed.title: Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals Hands IRS Defeat in Limited Partner Definition Case
feed.summary: The Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals ruled in Sirius Solutions, LLLP v. Commissioner that a "limited partner" for self-employment tax purposes is defined by limited liability under state law, overturning the IRS's attempt to impose self-employment tax on their distributive shares. This decision may lead to refund claims for individuals who paid self-employment tax on limited partner interests and could influence future partnership filing positions, although its direct application to LLCs and LLPs remains uncertain. The IRS might petition for a rehearing or nonacquiesce, with similar cases pending in other circuit courts.

feed.title: California aquifer project banks 78M gallons for future droughts
feed.summary: California American Water is utilizing its Aquifer Storage and Recovery (ASR) program to capture and store excess Carmel River flows, banking 78 million gallons since December 26, 2025, and 233 million gallons in water year 2024-2025. This initiative is part of a broader strategy to enhance water resilience in the face of increasing droughts, complementing water recycling and an approved desalination project. The ASR program operates only when state-mandated excess flows are available, highlighting the company's commitment to long-term water supply reliability.

feed.title: Citigroup CEO Jane Fraser Doesn't Expect 'Sell America' Sentiment to Last in Markets
feed.summary: Citigroup CEO Jane Fraser believes that the current "Sell America" sentiment in financial markets, driven by geopolitical headlines, will not last. She argues that despite initial market volatility, there are no obvious alternative investment opportunities and that the American consumer and entrepreneur remain strong. Fraser and other analysts, like Wedbush, are optimistic that tensions will calm and investors will refocus on the strong fundamentals of the U.S. economy.

feed.title: RB Global declares quarterly dividend of $0.31 per share
feed.summary: RB Global, Inc. announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.31 per common share, payable on March 2, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 9, 2026. The company, an omnichannel marketplace for commercial assets and vehicles, also reported strong third-quarter 2025 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. Additionally, National Bank Financial upgraded RB Global's stock to Outperform and raised its price target, citing recent contract wins and market share gains.

feed.title: Kurt Pletcher Sells 596 Shares of Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) Stock
feed.summary: Equinix insider Kurt Pletcher sold 596 shares of the company's stock on January 16th at an average price of $801.78, totaling $477,860.88. This transaction reduced his holding by 15.72% to 3,195 shares. The stock traded down $17.58 during midday trading on Tuesday, hitting $784.20, while the company reported mixed quarterly results and provided its FY2025 guidance.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) Chairman Sells 2,094 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) Chairman Charles Meyers sold 2,094 shares of the company's stock on January 16th, totaling over $1.68 million. This transaction reduced his direct ownership by 13.64%. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings and declared a quarterly dividend of $4.69 per share.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) Insider Sells 888 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) insider Jonathan Lin sold 888 shares of the company's stock for over $711,000 on January 16th, which decreased his ownership by 8.64%. This follows a previous sale of 124 shares in December. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings and announced a quarterly dividend, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock.

feed.title: Adaire Fox-Martin Sells 2,670 Shares of Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) Stock
feed.summary: Equinix CEO Adaire Fox-Martin recently sold 2,670 shares of company stock for over $2.1 million, reducing her ownership by 15.23%. This follows another sale in December. The company's stock has traded down 2.2% recently, though analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $959.64.

feed.title: Palomar (NASDAQ:PLMR) CEO Mac Armstrong Sells 2,310 Shares
feed.summary: Palomar CEO Mac Armstrong sold 2,310 shares of the company's stock on January 15th at $130.00 per share, totaling $300,300.00, reducing his stake by 2.8% to 80,314 shares. This follows a previous sale of 5,000 shares in November. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $2.01 and revenue of $244.7M, and analysts maintain a positive outlook with a "Moderate Buy" rating and a consensus price target of $159.50.

feed.title: Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) CFO Rajesh Vennam Sells 6,774 Shares
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants' CFO, Rajesh Vennam, sold 6,774 shares of the company's stock for over $1.45 million on January 15th, reducing his direct ownership by 42.84%. This transaction follows the company's recent quarterly earnings report where it missed analyst estimates slightly but posted a 7.3% year-over-year revenue increase. Darden also announced a $1.50 per share quarterly dividend, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus target price of $223.00.

feed.title: RB Global to Pay Quarterly Dividend of $0.31 a Share, Payable March 2 to Holders of Record Feb. 9
feed.summary: RB Global, Inc. has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.31 per share. This dividend is payable on March 2 to shareholders of record as of February 9. The announcement was made on January 20, 2026.

feed.title: Hasbro to announce fourth quarter and full year 2025 earnings on February 10, 2026
feed.summary: Hasbro, Inc. (HAS) has announced that it will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025 on February 10, 2026. The toy and game company specializes in the design, production, and marketing of toys, games, and entertainment content, with significant operations in the US. The announcement comes alongside recent board appointments and analyst rating adjustments for the company.

feed.title: A Global Equity Staple: Analyzing the iShares MSCI World ETF
feed.summary: The iShares MSCI World ETF (URTH) is performing well in a favorable macroeconomic climate, primarily driven by its heavy concentration in U.S. technology stocks, especially those related to AI. URTH tracks large and mid-cap companies across 23 developed nations, with over 69% of its assets in the U.S., making its performance closely tied to American mega-cap stocks. Despite competition from lower-cost Vanguard funds, its physical replication strategy and significant tech tilt remain key characteristics that will be influenced by central bank rate cuts and upcoming index rebalancing.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $2,630,000 of CONOCOPHILLIPS lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips disclosed $2,630,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, focusing on environmental policy, permitting reform, and oil and gas development. Key issues included streamlining environmental review processes, supporting specific legislation, and opposing certain BLM rules, particularly concerning the National Petroleum Reserve-Alaska (NPR-A) and the Willow project. The disclosure also covers congressional trading, insider trading, hedge fund activity, and analyst ratings related to ConocoPhillips (COP) stock.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $2,890,000 of BOEING COMPANY lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: Boeing Company disclosed $2,890,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, covering a broad range of issues including appropriations, aviation safety, defense, international sales, healthcare, homeland security, tax, and environmental regulations. The article also details recent congressional and insider trading activity in BA stock, as well as significant hedge fund movements and analyst ratings with price targets for the company.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $3,150,000 of GENERAL MOTORS COMPANY lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: General Motors Company (GM) recently disclosed $3,150,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, covering a range of issues from global market access to vehicle fuel economy and defense appropriations. The report also details recent insider trading activity, with GM insiders primarily selling shares, and institutional investor movements, showing both additions and reductions in GM stock holdings. Additionally, Wall Street analysts have issued various ratings and price targets for GM, with a median target of $86.0.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $3,753,899 of GENERAL DYNAMICS CORP lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: General Dynamics Corp (GD) has disclosed $3,753,899 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, covering a broad range of defense, appropriations, and regulatory issues. The article also details recent congressional and insider trading activity of GD stock, with both groups primarily selling shares. Furthermore, it highlights institutional investor movements and recent Wall Street analyst ratings and price targets for GD.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz files prospectus supplement for possible resale of 325 million shares
feed.summary: The Kraft Heinz Company announced it filed a prospectus supplement for the potential resale of up to 325 million shares of common stock by Berkshire Hathaway Inc., as per a 2015 agreement. This filing does not obligate Berkshire Hathaway to sell shares, nor will Kraft Heinz receive proceeds or issue new securities if sales occur. The shares are currently trading near their 52-week low, and the company offers a 6.8% dividend yield, amidst recent analyst downgrades, price target adjustments, leadership changes, and impacts from new dietary guidelines.

feed.title: Ford confirms it will move Lincoln's headquarters to train station
feed.summary: Ford is moving its Lincoln luxury brand headquarters to the Michigan Central campus in Detroit, a strategy aimed at further differentiating Lincoln from Ford vehicles. Approximately 55 Lincoln Marketing, Sales, and Service employees will relocate to the renovated train station in mid-February, occupying space alongside other Ford business units. This move follows Lincoln's strong performance in sales and recent top rankings in automotive brand reports, coinciding with Ford's broader reorganization of its white-collar workforce in metro Detroit.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $2,159,000 of NEXTERA ENERGY INC lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: NEXTERA ENERGY INC (NEE) disclosed $2,159,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, covering issues such as clean energy, nuclear energy, and tax incentives. The article also provides recent data on congressional stock trading in NEE, insider transactions, hedge fund activity, and analyst ratings with price targets for the stock.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $3,910,000 of LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: A new Lobbying Disclosure Act filing reveals that Lockheed Martin Corporation spent $3,910,000 on lobbying during Q4 2025. The lobbying efforts focused on diverse legislative issues, including defense appropriations, national defense authorization acts, and other appropriation bills related to defense, space, and environmental technology. The article also provides details on congressional stock trading, insider trading, hedge fund activity, and analyst ratings concerning LMT stock.

feed.title: IQVIA schedules Feb. 5 earnings call with webcast access
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. (NYSE: IQV) will announce its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on February 5, 2026, before the market opens. The company's management will host a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day for interested parties to join and view presentation slides. Details for registration and webcast access are available on the IQVIA Investor Relations website.

feed.title: KeyCorp Earnings: Net Interest Income Growth Drives Strong Performance
feed.summary: KeyCorp reported strong fourth-quarter results, driven by a 15% increase in net interest income and an 8% improvement in earnings per share, reaching $0.43. This performance led to a 12.4% return on tangible common equity, slightly exceeding expectations for the full year. Morningstar plans to increase its fair value estimate for KeyCorp stock due to higher near-term earnings growth, considering the shares fairly valued post-update.

feed.title: Mettler-Toledo appoints former STERIS CFO to board of directors
feed.summary: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE:MTD) has announced the appointment of Michael J. Tokich, former Senior Vice President and CFO of STERIS plc, to its Board of Directors, effective February 5, 2026. This appointment leverages Tokich's nearly two decades of experience as a public company CFO. The company, a global supplier of precision instruments, also recently reported strong Q2 2025 earnings and has seen positive ratings from several financial firms.
